texto: Whilst personal effectiveness focuses more on your personal development goals as you become the best practitioner in your area of specialty
autor: leadership excellence shifts the focus to your leadership development in making a difference to the greater circle within your areas of influence and beyond. Leadership excellence focuses on areas of concern on behalf of others because a leader is expected to grow from personal effectiveness to begin making a significant impact on the world around them.
